journal_red_flags: Lack of mathematical rigor, undefined variables, or missing formal proofs for theoretical claims
Superficial related work sections that fail to explicitly identify the research gap or critically analyze prior approaches
Omitting comprehensive ablation studies, failure analysis, or discussion of method limitations and boundary conditions
Presenting deep learning architectures as black boxes without theoretical, geometric, or physical interpretability
Relying solely on synthetic datasets or omitting qualitative visual comparisons alongside quantitative tables
Using informal, conversational, or overly promotional language without rigorous empirical backing
Omitting computational complexity, memory footprint, or runtime analysis for proposed methods
Using low-resolution, poorly labeled, or purely text-based descriptions for network architectures without accompanying diagrams
